titleStmt.title: SII 9.663: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 663. (A.R. No. 423 of 1920.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE NARASIMHASVAMI TEMPLE AT PENNAHOBILAM, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, corresponding to A.D. 1556 June 18, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya, ruling from Vidyānagara. It records that Kōnapadēva-Mahā-arasu, son of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Appayadēva-Mahā-arasu, exempted the Mahājanas of the agrahāras of Ānadale, Niṁbegalu, Rāyapanahaḷḷi, Kalidēvanahaḷḷi, Sirivara, Rēvināyakanahaḷḷi, Yaraguḍi, Tumbeganūru, Rāganahāḷu, Tāvaregoḷa, Chikapēpali, Timmāpura, Hōtūru, Benakānahaḷḷi, Aṇṭarasanahāḷu and Kamaḷahāḷu, situated in Uruvakoṇḍe-sīme, a sub-division of Rāyadurga-vēṇṭhe, from such taxes as taḷavārike, bēḍike, rāyasadavartane, karaṇikara-vartane, taḷavārike-vartane, yeleya-pammu, maharnavami-ulupe, Henne-dēvara-ulupe, kammatada-kūli, soppe, birāḍa, daṇḍina-kāṇike, janasāle and haraḷabiṭṭi. The gift was made in the presence of the god Narasimhasvāmi of Henne-Ahōbaḷa on the bank of the river Pinākinī, for the merit of the donor's father Appalarājayya and his brother Tirumalarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . prahlādahṛdayāṁbhōjarājahaṁsaṁ ramāpatiṁ . pinākītīranila
yaṁ śrīnrusiṁhaṁ bhajāmyahaṁ . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu sā
1478 neya naḷasaṁvatsarada Āśāḍha śudha 11 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāśivadēvamahārāyaru vidyānagaradalū ratna
siṁhāsanārūḍharāgi pruthvīsthirasāṁbrājyaṁgaiuttiralu rāyadurgada vēṁṭheyake
saluva Uruvakoṁḍeya sīmeyoḷagaṇa Agrāhāragaḷu Ānadale niṁbegalu rā
yapanahaḷi kalidēvanahaḷi sirivara rēvināyakanahaḷi yaraguḍi tuṁbeganūru
rāganahāḷu tāvaregoḷa cikapēpali tiṁmāpura hōtūru benakānahaḷi Aṁṭa
rasanahāḷu kamaḷahāḷu yivu muṁtāda Uruvakoṁḍeya sīmeya voḷagaṇa Agra
hāragaḷa nānāgōtragaḷa nānāsūtragaḷa nānāśākhādhyāyigaḷāda Uruvakoṁ
ḍeya sīmeyoḷagaṇa Ānadale modalāda Agrahāragaḷa Aśēṣavidvanmahā
janaṁgaḷige Ātrēyagōtrada Āpastaṁbasūtrada yajuśākheya śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara rāmarājaApayadēva mahāarasugaḷa kumāraru kōnapadēva ma
hāarasugaḷu koṭṭa Āgrahāragaḷa sarvamānyada dharmaśilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁda
re nāvu Agrahāragaḷali taḷavārike bēḍike rāyasadavartane Uruvakoṁḍeya
sīmeya karaṇikaravartane Uruvakoṁḍeya sthaḷada karaṇikara varttane nā
ḍataḷavārikevartana piṁjaṇigaṁgutuge yaleya paṁmu maharnavami U
lupe rokka heṁnedēvara Ulupe roka kaṁmatadakūli rokka sūppe birāḍada ro
kka daṁḍinakāṇike roka jānasāle Auḍalada haraḷa biṭi yiU moda
lāda yēnuṁṭāda cinivāna biṭigaḷu kāṇike kappagaḷu sahavāgi
yēnu Uṁṭāda yītibhādhegaḷanu biṭu prathamayēkādaśī pu(ṁ)ṇyakāla
dallu pinākinītīrada hene Ahōbalanārasiṁhyadēvara saṁnidhiyalu naṁ
ma taṁdegaḷu AppalarājaAyyanavarigū naṁma Aṁṇaṁdiru tiru
malarājagaḷigū pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu yēnu Uṁṭāddanu sarvamā
nyavāgi dhāreneredu koṭeU yeṁdu barasi hākisikoṭṭa dharmaśilāśāsana
�yo śilāśāsanadalli bareda Arthake nāu modalāgi Ārobaru tappidaru ta
ṁma mātāpitrugaḷanu taṁma guruUgaḷanu gōbrāhmaranu kāśiyali va
dhiśidaṁthā pātakake hōgaluḷavaru yeṁdu barasi hākiśi koṭa śilāśāsana
tiṁmāpurada Agrahārake grāma grāsavāgi vellaḍagi holadoḷage vīśvaranā
yakara tiṁmapanāyakaru koṭa hola sahavāgi biṭeU . dānapālanayō
rmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ .
svadatāṁ paradatāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭivaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā
jāyatē krimiḥ .
yī śāsanaṁ veyiṁcavacina mudrakarta pusuri rāma
rasu koḍaku veṁkaṭaya .
Digital edition of SII 9.663 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
